title: cynodon dactylon
intro: Cynodon dactylon, also known as Bermuda grass, is a type of creeping grass native to Africa and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cynodon dactylon include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Cynodon dactylon is often used in the form of tea, powder, or oil, and is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
